message:
✨ Add GitHub contributions tab to feedback dialog and link from profile coins (#1201)

- Add "GitHub" sub-tab to the Updates tab in FeatureRequestModal showing
  the user's PRs and issues across kubestellar and llm-d orgs with point
  values, breakdown badges, and links to GitHub
- Make the coins row in UserProfileDropdown clickable — opens the feedback
  dialog directly to the GitHub contributions tab
- Add contribution count badge on the GitHub sub-tab

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
